name: Atlanta Fed GDPNow — US Real GDP Growth (Q/Q SAAR)
notes: Atlanta Fed GDPNow real-time nowcast of US Q/Q annualised real GDP growth. Source: GDPTrackingModelDataAndForecasts.xlsx on the GDPNow homepage (https://www.atlantafed.org/cqer/research/gdpnow — canonical xlsx path verified 2026-06-11 by scraping the page's Downloads section). Updated 5-10 times per quarter on weekdays following key data releases (ISM, FT900, Retail Trade, Wholesale Trade, Construction Spending, Housing Starts, Durable Goods, Personal Income & Outlays, IP, Existing-Home Sales). The raw cadence is irregular within-quarter and silent between quarters; we declare frequency=Weekly because the compute_macro_market calculator resamples to weekly Friday (matching the rest of the macro_market spine) and forward-fills between updates. freshness_override_days=14 because the model is silent between the final-nowcast-of-Q and initial-nowcast-of-Q+1 days (typically a ~3-5 business-day window around BEA's advance estimate); 14 days catches a stale endpoint without false-positives during the normal quiet windows. Wired §3.1.4 2026-06-11 — first §3.1.4 nowcast via a NEW primary-source fetcher.
